name: edytor-stron
description: Edytor stron z modułową bazą danych

scripts.dev: cross-env NODE_ENV=development concurrently "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.dev:backend: cross-env NODE_ENV=development npm run dev --prefix backend
scripts.dev:frontend: cross-env NODE_ENV=development npm run dev --prefix frontend
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix frontend && npm run build --prefix backend
scripts.render-build: npm install && npm run install:all && npm run build
scripts.start:local: npm run build && npm run start:prod
